title: Glitch Resource Pack
description: A surreal resource pack that replaces all block textures with glitchy, distorted visuals – perfect for horror, sci-fi, or corrupted worlds.
body:
# ⚠️ **ALERT** ⚠️
## _**Go to my [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/members/aloaqplay/projects) to more updates!**_

## ℹ️ Info ℹ️
### 📄 **Description**
- **Glitch Resource Pack** is a Minecraft Java Edition pack that gives your game a unique, distorted look. All block textures are replaced with glitch-style visuals, creating a surreal and broken atmosphere — ideal for horror maps, corrupted dimensions, or just a fresh and eerie aesthetic. **If you find a bug or a missing texture, please write it in the comments**

### 🔧 **Current Features (Alpha 1.5)** 

- Replaces basic blocks with glitch-style textures  
- Visual distortion effects with strong color shifts  
- Consistent 16x resolution for vanilla feel

### 🧪 **Development Status** 

- This pack is in _**Alpha**_, meaning more blocks and features are being added over time. Expect frequent updates!

### ✅ **Compatible With:** 

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.8  
- Works with Vanilla

## 💡 **_Feel free to suggest blocks or features to glitch next !_** 💡 

## ⚠️ **WARNINGS** ⚠️
- **THIS RESOURCE PACK IS NOT FOR EPILEPSY !!!** ⚠️
- **THIS RESOURCE PACK IS NOT CREATED FOR A CHALLENGE, BECAUSE ALL BLOCKS HAVE THE SAME TEXTURE !!!** ⚠️
- **ALL VERSIONS FROM ALPHA 1.3 ARE NOT SUITABLE FOR WEAK COMPUTERS !!!** ⚠️
- **THE RESOURCE PACK IS UNDER DEVELOPMENT. IN THE UPDATES SECTION IT SAYS THAT A TEXTURE HAS BEEN ADDED OR MODIFIED, BUT IT MAY NOT BE STABLE — SOMETHING CAN BREAK !!!** ⚠️
##  

## ✅ **_Updates:_** ✅

**(ALPHA 1.0)**  
- In the first **Alpha** of this resource pack, basic textures such as **stone**, **grass**, and many more were added!

**(ALPHA 1.1)**  
- Edited texture for **Jungle Log**  
- Added textures for **Melon** and **Podzol**

**(ALPHA 1.2)**  
- Edited texture for **Redstone Dust**  
- Added textures for **Coarse Dirt**, **Mud**, **Red Sand**, **Red Sandstone**, **Moss Block**, **Pale Moss Block**, **Prismarine**, and all textures in section **Tools & Utilities**

**(ALPHA 1.3)**  
- Added texture for **Water**, **Lava**, **Powder Snow**, **Sun**, **Moon**, **Pumpkin**  
- Edited textures for all **Doors** and **Pressure Plates**  
- Edited GUI textures in `assets/minecraft/textures/gui/container`

**(ALPHA 1.4)**  
- Edited **Button Text in MENU** 
- Addded texture for **Magma Block**

**(ALPHA 1.5)**
- Added textures for **Mycelium**, **Rooted Dirt**, **Farmland**, **Crying Obsidian**


❤️ **Thank you and enjoy!**
